title: blepharis noli-me-tangere
intro: Blepharis noli-me-tangere, also known as the "touch-me-not" or "Noli me tangere" plant, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Blepharis noli-me-tangere include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves, to treat various ailments.
